title: more grass EZ
description: more grass and natural look for your minecraft world
body:
Enhance your Minecraft world with the "More Grass EZ" mod! In addition to increasing natural grass generation, this mod adds nearly 10 variations of short and tall grass sizes to your world. With diverse grass types, your environment will look more dynamic and visually appealing. Perfect for both survival and creative modes, it’s easy to install and fully compatible with other mods.

FORGE AND NEOFORGE
